title: URAファイナルズ予選にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is a stage upon which all
Umamusume can shine.

At long last, the day of the preliminaries has
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, thank you for seeing
<chrname> off.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You've finally made it this far. As a fan, I'm
elated.
choice_data_list: We'll make it one for the history books!

text_block_list.text:
Heheheh, I've no doubt. I'm looking forward to
the race!

The gates will fly open any minute now... URA
Finale, here we come!
